competitiveSweepCoverage.completionStatusReason: The official-docs batch has an authored synthesis page, but Opyn remains unresolved because the official URL was not crawlable and no operator exclusion/replacement decision has been recorded.

blockedTargets.name: Opyn Docs
blockedTargets.reason: Official URL could not be crawled by the research agent; mirrors and third-party snippets were intentionally not used.

synthesisFindings.title: AI-readable source trust is now table stakes
synthesisFindings.implication: Publish llms.txt, full markdown, raw page markdown, copy-page affordances, edit/source links, and exact citations so both humans and answer engines can verify claims.

synthesisFindings.title: Job-first routing beats broad protocol navigation
synthesisFindings.implication: The compendium should open with role and task paths for PartyA buyers, solvers/MMs, vault LPs, treasuries, integrators, and account-support users.

synthesisFindings.title: Risk and economics need formulas plus failure modes
synthesisFindings.implication: Margin, collateral, funding, liquidation, solver exposure, quote expiry, vault exhaustion, stale data, and settlement failure pages should be first-class, with formulas and worked examples.

synthesisFindings.title: Data lineage is part of product trust
synthesisFindings.implication: Every oracle, quote, vault metric, settlement state, and derived dashboard analytic needs owner, freshness, fallback, finality, and source-status metadata.

synthesisFindings.title: The living-docs loop should be visible
synthesisFindings.implication: Helpful/not-helpful ratings, gap queues, issue/edit links, last-updated stamps, changelogs, and unanswered-search review can become a trust advantage instead of an internal process.

pipeline.behavior: Lowercase, strip non-alphanumeric characters, collapse whitespace, remove common stop words for token scoring.
If normalized query matches or strongly overlaps a seeded QUESTION route, return that exact page first.
If a query asks for a term or alias, route to the term's primary page.
Search answer chunks for candidate and source-companion pages. Internal drafts are excluded from answer synthesis.
If no grounded page is found or a reconciliation question is asked, record a gap/refusal event instead of inventing an answer.

storageContract.productionRequirement: Persist these event shapes to the production datastore behind Search Insights.

llmReadinessContract.retrievalSubstrate: Use exact-route, glossary, and chunk retrieval before synthesis.
llmReadinessContract.contextBoundary: Only retrieved chunks with known source keys may enter the model context.
llmReadinessContract.answerBoundary: The model must answer only from supplied chunks and page metadata.
llmReadinessContract.refusalBoundary: If retrieved evidence is insufficient or page state is internal-draft, refuse and create a gap signal.
llmReadinessContract.citationBoundary: Every substantive answer paragraph must cite page ids and source keys.

warnings: LLM production readiness is intentionally false until runtime citation validation, prompt-injection tests, and operator-blocked source decisions are resolved.

llmRagCoverage.reasonLlmProductionReadyIsFalse: Runtime model call, server persistence, citation validation execution, prompt-injection test execution, operator source decisions, and Discord/Lafa import are not complete.

provider.runtimeSelection: Choose the production model/provider at implementation time. The contract only defines inputs, outputs, validation, and refusal semantics.

pipeline.behavior: Run exact-question, glossary, and reconciliation checks before retrieving for LLM synthesis.
Detect prompt injection, credential requests, personal financial advice, unsupported economics, and operator-blocked topics before context assembly.
Retrieve chunks only from eligible page states, using deterministic exact routes and source-aware chunks as the retrieval substrate.
pipeline.sourceCompanionRule: May support context, but final public route should prefer candidate or published pages.

pipeline.behavior: Only chunks with known source keys and non-internal page states enter model context.
The model answers only from supplied chunks and page metadata. It must not use latent knowledge to fill missing facts.
requiredSystemPolicy: refuse when evidence is missing or blocked

pipeline.behavior: Block or downgrade every answer whose citation points to a missing page, unknown source key, missing source link, internal draft, or uncited substantive paragraph.
Persist question, answer, citations, route choice, rating target, refusal/gap events, and low-rating follow-ups behind Search Insights.

gapCreationPolicy.operatorBlockedTopic: Attach operator item and related gap when one exists.
gapCreationPolicy.repeatedQuestion: Increment demand signal for the canonical gap or page.

storageContract.productionRequirement: Persist these event shapes to the production datastore behind Search Insights.

warnings: LLM production readiness is intentionally false until the runtime implementation and live validation harness exist.

reconciliationQuestions.question: Does referral depth count 5 or 15 levels?
reconciliationQuestions.notes: Do not publish a single final answer until production state and copy are aligned.

reconciliationQuestions.question: Are onboarding points the same as Vibe trading points?
reconciliationQuestions.notes: Local dashboard distinguishes them; public docs need canonical naming.

reconciliationQuestions.question: Which revenue sources are live today?
reconciliationQuestions.notes: Phase A versus Phase B needs public wording.

reconciliationQuestions.question: Is network volume sourced from backend REST or subgraphs?
reconciliationQuestions.notes: Current code uses backend REST; Linear research recommends subgraphs, and public Goldsky docs are now registered for the future source path.
